content.title: Frontier signal: OpenAI Agents SDK
content.markdown:
# Frontier signal: OpenAI Agents SDK

Date: 2026-06-27.
Kind: agent.
Source: https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/agents.
Watch for: guardrails, tracing, handoffs, MCP, tool annotations.
Adapt to KAIZEN7: adapter-registry, openai-agent-adapter, agent-advisor.

Next: score this as a supervised KAIZEN7 adapter before implementation.
Risk: reject hype, credentials, paid resources, unclear licenses, unsafe publication and unverified claims.

Rules: Official docs, changelogs and primary repositories first. No claim enters memory as fact without a source URL or observed local evidence. Adapt patterns before adding dependencies.
